appliedUpdates.description: Updated: added temp HOME approach for testing 'no sources found' scenario (HOME=<tmpdir> overrides source detection paths without touching real user files)

testingNotes.environment: macOS darwin 25.4.0. Re-run of core-script milestone to resolve 1 blocked assertion from round 1.
testingNotes.resolution: VAL-SRC-006 was blocked in round 1 because removing real user source configs was not possible. Resolved in round 2 by using HOME=<tmpdir> environment variable override, which makes detectSources() check temp paths instead of real user home. The script correctly printed 'No source configurations found.', listed all 4 checked paths, and exited with code 1.
testingNotes.technique: HOME env var override provides clean isolation for source detection tests without modifying real user files
